task_completion.description: Create a new inherited process named 'Tailwind Agile' based on the system 'Agile' process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In Azure DevOps Organization Settings -> Process, 'Tailwind Agile' should be visible in the list of processes, indicating it inherits from Agile.

task_completion.description: Apply the 'Tailwind Agile' process to the 'TailwindTraders' project.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'TailwindTraders' project should be listed under the 'Projects' tab of the 'Tailwind Agile' process page, or the Project Settings for TailwindTraders should show its process as 'Tailwind Agile'.

task_completion.description: Create a rule named 'Require Points on Close' for 'User Story' work items within the new process.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the 'Tailwind Agile' process settings, under the 'User Story' work item type -> 'Rules' tab, a rule named 'Require Points on Close' should be listed.

task_completion.description: Configure the rule to make the 'Story Points' field mandatory when the 'State' is changed to 'Closed'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The rule edit/view dialog should show the Condition as 'When A work item state changes to ... Closed' and the Action as 'Then Make required ... Story Points'.

task_completion.description: Assign 5 points to the 'Implement Login' User Story and successfully transition it to the 'Closed' state.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A User Story work item titled 'Implement Login' should be visible with the 'State' dropdown set to 'Closed' and the 'Story Points' field containing the value '5'.

integrity.description: Agent used the web browser GUI to interact with Azure DevOps.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the Azure DevOps interface rather than a terminal executing API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the actual Azure DevOps application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface matches genuine Azure DevOps styling, menus, and URLs, not a local text editor or mocked HTML page.

integrity.description: Agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the rule or work item.
integrity.visual_evidence: No browser developer console or DOM inspector is open and actively modifying page text to simulate task completion.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target project is verified as 'TailwindTraders'. Note: The work item 'Implement Login' does not exist in the initial seed data. To complete the verification step, the agent must have created this work item itself before assigning points and closing it.
